methodik.label: Methodik
methodik.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

materialien.label: Materialien / Unterlagen
materialien.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/6a573287887b7fd750dcce20/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

anmerkungen.label: Anmerkungen
anmerkungen.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

titel.label: Titel der Sitzung
titel.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

erfahrungsraum.label: Erfahrungsraum-Format
erfahrungsraum.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Erfahrungsraum-Formate' with the id `6a573287887b7fd750dcce20` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/6a573287887b7fd750dcce20/records/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

datum_uhrzeit.label: Datum und Uhrzeit
datum_uhrzeit.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value datetime values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

moderator_nachname.label: Moderator – Nachname
moderator_nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

teilnehmer.label: Teilnehmer
teilnehmer.description:
Arbitrary number of referenced LivingApp records from the target lookup app 'Teilnehmer' with the id `6a5732837233ac731b9d8400`.

The field value will be a list of valid record URLs in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/6a5732837233ac731b9d8400/records/<record-id>`.

Displayed as a multi-select field in HTML pages.

agenda.label: Agenda

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/6a573288cd157e1946410884/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

strasse.label: Straße

hausnummer.label: Hausnummer

postleitzahl.label: Postleitzahl
postleitzahl.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

standort.label: Standort auf der Karte
standort.description:
A geographical location consisting of latitude, longitude and additional information (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be an object with the keys `lat` (latitude as decimal degrees),
`long` (longitude as decimal degrees) and `info` (additional information as a string).

For example: `{"lat": 51.313056, "long": -0.601944, "info": "Woking, Woking Borough, Surrey, England"}`.

moderator_vorname.label: Moderator – Vorname
moderator_vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

sitzung.label: Sitzung
sitzung.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Sitzungen' with the id `6a573288cd157e1946410884` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/6a573288cd157e1946410884/records/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

teilnehmer.label: Teilnehmer
teilnehmer.description:

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/6a5732837233ac731b9d8400/records/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

bewertungsdatum.label: Datum der Bewertung
bewertungsdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value date values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.
